summary: Completed comprehensive testing of booking app time slot functionality with Calgary timezone integration. All core features working correctly.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 500 error - likely missing Stripe configuration in test environment
flaky_endpoints.impact: Payment processing not functional, but doesn't affect time slot filtering

passed_tests: Booking modal opens correctly when clicking 'Book Now' buttons
Past time slots properly filtered for today's date based on Calgary timezone
All time slots (9:00 AM - 7:00 PM) available for future dates
Minimum selectable date is today (cannot select past dates)
All form fields present and functional (name, email, phone, date, time, notes)
Form validation and interaction working correctly
success_percentage: Backend: 67% (2/3 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all time slot features working)
